inputs.text: A melancholic Korean idol woman with platinum blonde voluminous curls cascading past her shoulders, shot from behind as she looks over her shoulder with wistful aegyo-sal eyes and softly parted lips. Baby face with dewy porcelain skin, subtle smoky eyeshadow, gradient rose lips. She wears an elegant black dress with a low back, standing in a traditional Korean hanok courtyard with weathered wooden pillars and stone pathways. Studio butterfly lighting from above sculpts dramatic cheekbone shadows. Shot on 35mm lens, tight headshot, environmental portrait. Shallow depth of field blurs the courtyard's curved tile roof into bokeh. Atmospheric, poetic stillness, fashion editorial quality, vivid chromatic palette, ultra-detailed skin texture.
lowres, deformed, blurry, watermark, ugly, low quality
